languages.text: "Я думал, это из-за удара... Словно гул или писк какой-то. Тяжело думать и не терять контроля. Простите, Ваша Светлость..." {n}Покрытое испариной лицо пилота дрожит от напряжения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я думал, это из-за удара... Словно гул или писк какой-то. Тяжело думать и не терять контроля. Простите, Ваша Светлость..." {n}Покрытое испариной лицо пилота дрожит от напряжения.{/n}
traits.speaker: OurCrewPilot

languages.text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я думал, это из-за удара... Словно гул или писк какой-то. Тяжело думать и не терять контроля. Простите, Ваша Светлость..." {n}Покрытое испариной лицо пилота дрожит от напряжения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

"I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}
"I thought it was the concussion... But yes, Lord Captain. It's like a hum or a whine at the edge of my consciousness. Makes it hard to think. To keep control of myself."

"I thought it was the result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's relief is so great he dares a faint smile.{/n}

"I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's relief is so great he dares a faint smile.{/n}

"I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

"I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

languages.text: 「脳震盪のせいだと思っていましたが……ええ、ロード・キャプテン。意識の縁で、かすかな唸りやキーンという音がします。考えるのが難しく、自制を保つのも大変です」
languages.original_text: "I thought it was the concussion... But yes, Lord Captain. It's like a hum or a whine at the edge of my consciousness. Makes it hard to think. To keep control of myself."

traits.locale_text: 「脳震盪のせいだと思っていましたが……ええ、ロード・キャプテン。意識の縁で、かすかな唸りやキーンという音がします。考えるのが難しく、自制を保つのも大変です。」

languages.text: « J'ai cru que c'était le contrecoup de l'impact... Comme un bourdonnement ou une sorte de hurlement strident. Difficile de garder les idées claires, dans ces conditions. Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie... » {n}Couvert de sueur, le visage du pilote est pris de tics nerveux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « J'ai cru que c'était le contrecoup de l'impact... Comme un bourdonnement ou une sorte de hurlement strident. Difficile de garder les idées claires, dans ces conditions. Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie... » {n}Couvert de sueur, le visage du pilote est pris de tics nerveux.{/n}

languages.text: "Çarpma yüzünden olduğunu sanıyordum... Uğultu ya da tiz bir çığlık gibi. Sağlıklı düşünmek, kendimi kaybetmemek için zorlanıyorum. Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri..." {n}Pilotun yüzünden terler akıyor, gerginlikle titriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Çarpma yüzünden olduğunu sanıyordum... Uğultu ya da tiz bir çığlık gibi. Sağlıklı düşünmek, kendimi kaybetmemek için zorlanıyorum. Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri..." {n}Pilotun yüzünden terler akıyor, gerginlikle titriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich dachte, das wäre eine Folge des Aufschlags ... Wie ein Summen oder ein hochfrequentes Kreischen. Es fällt mir schwer, einen klaren Gedanken zu fassen. Verzeiht mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ..." {n}Das Gesicht des Piloten ist schweißnass und zittert vor Anspannung.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte, das wäre eine Folge des Aufschlags ... Wie ein Summen oder ein hochfrequentes Kreischen. Es fällt mir schwer, einen klaren Gedanken zu fassen. Verzeiht mir, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ..." {n}Das Gesicht des Piloten ist schweißnass und zittert vor Anspannung.{/n}

languages.text: «Creí que era una secuela del impacto... Noto un zumbido, o una especie de chirrido estridente. Me cuesta pensar con claridad, mantener el control. Le ruego que me perdone, mi{mf|lord|lady}...». {n}El piloto está sudoroso y tiembla por la tensión que siente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Creí que era una secuela del impacto... Noto un zumbido, o una especie de chirrido estridente. Me cuesta pensar con claridad, mantener el control. Le ruego que me perdone, mi{mf|lord|lady}...». {n}El piloto está sudoroso y tiembla por la tensión que siente.{/n}

languages.text: “我以为那是撞击造成的……就像一种嗡鸣声，或是某种高频尖啸。我无法正常思考，似乎随时都可能失控。抱歉，大人……”{n}飞行员冷汗直冒，紧张得浑身颤抖。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I thought it was a result of the impact... Like a hum or some kind of high-pitched screeching. It's a struggle to think straight, to keep from losing it. My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}..." {n}The pilot's face is sweating and shaking with tension.{/n}
